avatarScaling.title: Ukulinganisa Ubungakanani be-Avatar
avatarScaling.subtitle: Isetho yemveli ye-VRChat yokulinganisa ubude nge-OSC — isebenza kuyi-avatar nayiphi na
avatarScaling.hotkeyHint: Izitshixo zesheshane zisebenza kwindawo yonke (nangona VRChat inokugxila). Ukuba itshixo alirekhodi, usenako ukusebenzisa isilayidi esingasentla.
translator.title: Iguqulelo
translator.aiGrammarFix: Lungisa igrama nge-AI kuqala (isebenzisa umboneleli we-IntelliChat ongasentla)
translator.note: Isetyenziswa yinketho yenguqulelo ebhokisini yencoko ye-Live Typing, nakuyiphi na indawo kule-app enika inketho ethi "Guqulela ngaphambi kokuthumela."
liveTyping.title: Ukuchwetheza Bukhoma
liveTyping.subtitle: ithumela ngoxa uchwetheza, njengebhokisi yencoko ka-VRChat
liveTyping.placeholder: Chwetheza apha — oku kuthunyelwa kwibhokisi yencoko ngokuzenzekelayo nkqu nemizuzwana embalwa ngoxa uchwetheza. Qhubeka uchwetheza ngapha kwiimpawu ezi-144; i-VRChat izabonisa '…' + isiphelo somyalezo wakho.
languagePicker.title: Khetha ulwimi lwakho
languagePicker.subtitle: Ungatshintsha oku kamva ku-Useto.
settingsLanguage.title: Ulwimi
settingsLanguage.label: Ulwimi lwe-app
